rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing the expression type mismatch in the assume statement to bool
Ensure the assume statement is properly closed with a semicolon and the annex block is properly terminated
generic_rules: Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
Align helper declaration types with the expression types they represent
Trace unresolved identifiers to their root cause before adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use semicolons to terminate AGREE statements and proper block termination
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the analyzed model
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about assume/guarantee syntax
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
AGREE validator diagnostics about model traceability
